title: Fox Drops│狐狸掉落物
description: Fox will drop Berries when killed.│狐狸被擊殺時會掉落漿果。
body:
⚠️ This data pack requires the data pack [Records the Level of Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/datapack/records-the-level-of-fortune-and-looting-enchantments).│這個資料包需要資料包[記錄附魔的等級](https://modrinth.com/datapack/records-the-level-of-fortune-and-looting-enchantments)。 ⚠️
# Function│功能
Fox will drop 0-2 Sweet Berries or Glow Berries (maybe mixed) when killed, and each level of Looting enchantment on the weapon will increase the drop limit by 1.│狐狸被擊殺後會掉落0-2個甜漿果或發光漿果（可能混搭），武器上的每一級掠奪附魔會使掉落數量的上限+1。
